name: Grilled Squid with Sweet and Sour Cucumber, Corn and Vidali
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds whole squid, skinned and cleaned
olive oil to brush on squid
recipeInstructions:
Brush the squid lightly with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Grill for 20-30 seconds on each side. Slice the squid into 1/2-inch slices. Toss with the sweet and sour cucumber salad and marinade. Serve.
SWEET AND SOUR CUCUMBER SALAD
Combine the cucumbers, red peppers, onions, and salt in a bowl. Let stand for 3 hours to allow flavors to meld. Drain any excess liquid if needed. Add corn kernels and toss with the marinade. Serve alongside grilled squid.
MARINADE
Combine all ingredients in a bowl and toss with the sweet and sour cucumber salad before serving.
